title: [Spider Temple, Cell]
description: Cool air seems to radiate from the large basalt slab that serves as bed but looks, for all the world, like a bier, giving the room a funereal cast.  Manacles, anxious to slowly gnaw upon the spirit of another captive, hang expectant against the basalt walls which seem to suck the light from the very air.

wayto.25497: ;e begin; fput 'search'; search_result = waitfor 'don\'t find anything', 'the opening of an escape tunnel', 'nothing other than the tunnel', 'Roundtime:'; waitrt?; end until search_result =~ /tunnel/; move 'go tunnel'
